concepts.name: Vector Space
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors that is closed under addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Linear Independence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors where no vector can be expressed as a linear combination of the others.

concepts.name: Linear Dependence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors where at least one vector can be expressed as a linear combination of the others.

concepts.name: Span
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible linear combinations of a given set of vectors.

concepts.name: Basis
concepts.short_definition: A linearly independent set of vectors that spans a vector space.

concepts.name: Dimension
concepts.short_definition: The number of vectors in any basis of a vector space.

concepts.name: Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: A function between vector spaces that preserves vector addition and scalar multiplication.

concepts.name: Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A rectangular array of numbers, symbols, or expressions, arranged in rows and columns.

concepts.name: Column Space
concepts.short_definition: The span of the column vectors of a matrix.

concepts.name: Row Space
concepts.short_definition: The span of the row vectors of a matrix.

concepts.name: Rank of a Matrix
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the column space (or row space) of a matrix.

concepts.name: Null Space
concepts.short_definition: The set of all vectors that are mapped to the zero vector by a linear transformation (or matrix).

concepts.name: Rank-Nullity Theorem
concepts.short_definition: Relates the rank and nullity of a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Nullity
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the null space of a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Image of a Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible output vectors of a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Rank of a Linear Transformation
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the image of a linear transformation.

concepts.name: Row Echelon Form
concepts.short_definition: A matrix form where leading entries are to the right of leading entries in rows above.

concepts.name: Reduced Row Echelon Form
concepts.short_definition: A row echelon form where leading entries are 1 and all other entries in their columns are 0.

concepts.name: Pivot Position
concepts.short_definition: The position of the first non-zero entry in a row of a matrix in echelon form.

concepts.name: Pivot Column
concepts.short_definition: A column of a matrix that contains a pivot position.

concepts.name: Rank from REF/RREF
concepts.short_definition: The rank of a matrix is the number of non-zero rows in its row echelon form.

concepts.name: Rank from Pivot Columns
concepts.short_definition: The rank of a matrix is the number of pivot columns.

concepts.name: Full Rank
concepts.short_definition: A matrix has full rank if its rank equals the minimum of its number of rows and columns.

concepts.name: Rank Deficient
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that does not have full rank.

concepts.name: Singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a determinant of zero, implying it is not invertible and has a rank less than its dimension.

concepts.name: Non-singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a non-zero determinant, implying it is invertible and has full rank.

concepts.name: Transpose of a Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix obtained by interchanging rows and columns of the original matrix.

concepts.name: Rank of Transpose
concepts.short_definition: The rank of a matrix is equal to the rank of its transpose.

concepts.name: Linear System
concepts.short_definition: A collection of linear equations involving the same set of variables.

concepts.name: Consistent System
concepts.short_definition: A linear system that has at least one solution.

concepts.name: Inconsistent System
concepts.short_definition: A linear system that has no solution.

concepts.name: Augmented Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix formed by appending the columns of two given matrices, often used for solving linear systems.

concepts.name: Rank and Solutions
concepts.short_definition: The rank of the coefficient matrix and augmented matrix determines the consistency of a linear system.

concepts.name: Subspace
concepts.short_definition: A vector space that is a subset of another vector space.

concepts.name: Rank of a Subspace
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of a subspace.

concepts.name: Orthogonal Complement
concepts.short_definition: The set of all vectors orthogonal to every vector in a given subspace.

concepts.name: Fundamental Subspaces
concepts.short_definition: The four key subspaces associated with a matrix: column space, null space, row space, and left null space.

concepts.name: Left Null Space
concepts.short_definition: The null space of the transpose of a matrix.

concepts.name: Rank of a Submatrix
concepts.short_definition: The rank of a matrix formed by selecting a subset of rows and columns.

concepts.name: Determinant
concepts.short_definition: A scalar value that can be computed from the elements of a square matrix.
